text: Indeed, We have granted you Ë¹O ProphetËº abundant goodness. <sup foot_note=1332>1332</sup>

foot_notes.1332: This includes a heavenly river as well other favours in both worlds.

text: So pray and sacrifice to your Lord Ë¹aloneËº.
Only the one who hates you is truly cut off Ë¹from any goodnessËº.
